title: Most Visited Sector in  a Circular Track
titleCn: 圆形赛道上经过次数最多的扇区

testcases.input: n = 4, rounds = [1,3,1,2] Output: [1,2] Explanation: The marathon starts at sector 1. The order of the visited sectors is as follows: 1 --> 2 --> 3 (end of round 1) --> 4 --> 1 (end of round 2) --> 2 (end of round 3 and the marathon) We can see that both sectors 1 and 2 are visited twice and they are the most visited sectors. Sectors 3 and 4 are visited only once.
testcases.expectedOutput: [1,2] Explanation: The marathon starts at sector 1.
